body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49014", "cvss": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-121", "name": "Stack-based Buffer Overflow"}], "description": "In GDAL 3.1.0 through 3.13.0, scanForGeometryContainers in the netCDF driver allows code execution via a stack-based buffer overflow. It reads a geometry attribute into a fixed-size stack buffer without validating the attribute length. The attacker embeds the exploit as an oversized geometry attribute in a crafted NetCDF file. This achieves arbitrary code execution on the server running GDAL. This is in frmts/netcdf/netcdfsg.cpp.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00102, "percentile": 0.01166}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wphc-7cm7-8mf7", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T18:07:07Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wphc-7cm7-8mf7", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wphc-7cm7-8mf7"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49014"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-27T02:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-27T03:30:31Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49014", "https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal/issues/14594", "https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal/pull/14598", "https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal/commit/f5ebabc1042f3c59b24e7c8ad45dda242d127f09", "https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal/blob/v3.13.1/NEWS.md", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/gdal/PYSEC-2026-193.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wphc-7cm7-8mf7"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/OSGeo/gdal", "summary": "GDAL: scanForGeometryContainers in the netCDF driver allows code execution via a stack-based buffer overflow", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T18:07:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wphc-7cm7-8mf7", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.13.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "gdal"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.1.0, < 3.13.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: GDAL: scanForGeometryContainers in the netCDF driver allows code execution via a stack-based buffer overflow
